title: Gear Fourth Presses Doflamingo — Closing Beat
description: Boundman dominates the battlefield, but Doflamingo’s endurance keeps Dressrosa in danger.
scene: On pages 15–18, Luffy, Doflamingo, Trafalgar Law, Trebol move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who is that huge guy!? He just dropkicked the hell out of Doflamingo's face!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Now he's bouncing away like some kind of ball!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Damn it! That punk ...he's still nothing but plain old rubber!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He hardened his skin with Busoshoku... and with that increase in tensile strength, his power's increased many times over!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Even though he's hardened by buso- shook...

summary: This part focuses on gear fourth presses doflamingo, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
